current_mission: Ship v7.1 Context and Reference Integrity.

active_work_items.summary: Implement context/reference integrity writers, audit gate, Mission Control projection, tests, and release docs.

latest_decisions: v7.1 should promote context/reference integrity into a release-state gate.
priority_summary: Prevent release claims that rely on stale, hidden, unavailable, or unreviewed context.
go_no_go_status_summary: go after writer, audit, Mission Control projection, tests, and release-state audit pass.
actor_composition_summary: Builder implements; Guardian verifies with tests and audit; Architecture Council reviews release evidence.
next_recommended_action: Run context-reference-integrity-audit and release-state-audit before tagging v7.1.0.
